title: SearchEvent
description: One search request/response observed by a service. Version 1.

event_time.description: When the request completed, set by the producing service.

ingest_time.description: Set by the ingest service; null at the producer. event_time vs ingest_time exposes pipeline lag.

trace_id.description: Shared across the services that handled the request.

query_hash.description: Hashed query — never the raw query text (privacy).

result_ids.description: Truncated top results; full result sets are not telemetry.

relevance_score.description: Offline/online relevance signal in [0,1]; null when not scored.
